/*--------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

/* --- STC MCU Limited ---------------- -----------------------------------*/

/* --- STC89-90xx Series 16-bit Timer Demo ---------------------------*/

/* --- Mobile: (86)13922805190 ------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Fax: 86-755-82905966 ----------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Tel: 86-755-82948412 -----------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Web: www.STCMCU.com -----------------------------------------*/

/* If you want to use the program or the program referenced in the */

/* article, please specify in which data and procedures from STC */

/*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
ited. typedef unsigned char BYTE;
Lim typedef unsigned int WORD;

//-----------------------------------------------
#include "reg51.h"

CU /* define constants */

#define FOSC 18432000L
STC M #define T1MS (65536-FOSC/12/1000)
                                                   //1ms timer calculation method in 12T mode

/* define SFR */

sbit ET2 = IE^5;

sfr T2CON = 0xc8;                                  //timer2 control register
sbit TF2 = T2CON^7;
sbit TR2 = T2CON^2;

sfr T2MOD = 0xc9;                                  //timer2 mode register
sfr RCAP2L = 0xca;
sfr RCAP2H = 0xcb;
sfr TL2 = 0xcc;
sfr TH2 = 0xcd;

sbit TEST_LED = P1^0;                              //work LED, flash once per second

/* define variables */                             //1000 times counter
WORD count;

//-----------------------------------------------

230                                                0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966       0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

/* Timer2 interrupt routine */

void tm2_isr() interrupt 5 using 1

{

   TF2 = 0;

   if (count-- == 0)                                   //1ms * 1000 -> 1s
                                                       //reset counter
   {                                                   //work LED flash

      count = 1000;                                 ited. //initial timer2 low byte

      TEST_LED = ! TEST_LED;                           //initial timer2 high byte
                                                       //timer2 start running
   }
                                                    Lim //enable timer2 interrupt
}
                                                       //open global interrupt switch
//-----------------------------------------------
                                                    CU //initial counter
/* main program */                                 M//loop

void main()

{

   RCAP2L = TL2 = T1MS;             

   RCAP2H = TH2 = T1MS >> 8; 

   TR2 = 1;           

   ET2 = 1;           

   EA = 1;            

   count = 0;                   

   while (1);         STC 
}

;/* define constants */             ;1ms(1000Hz) timer (65536-18432000/12/1000)
T1MS EQU 0FA00H

;/* define SFR */

ET2 BIT IE.5

STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.GXWMCU.com Tel:13922829991 Tel:13922805190

T2CON EQU   0C8H         ;timer2 control register
TF2 BIT     T2CON.7
TR2 BIT     T2CON.2

T2MOD EQU   0C9H         ;timer2 mode register
RCAP2L EQU  0CAH
RCAP2H EQU  0CBH
TL2 EQU     0CCH
TH2 EQU     0CDH

TEST_LED BIT P1.0        ;work LED, flash once per second

;/* define variables */

COUNT DATA 30H           ;1000 times counter (2 bytes)
ited. ;-----------------------------------------------
ORG0000H
MAIN
Lim LJMP002BH
TM2_ISR
ORG
LJMP
MCU ;-----------------------------------------------
STC ;/* main program */
                                                    ;initial timer2 mode
MAIN:
MOV T2MOD,#00H

MOV T2CON,#00H                                      ;timer2 stop

MOV TL2,#00H                                        ;initial timer2 low byte

MOV TH2,#00H                                        ;initial timer2 high byte

MOV RCAP2L,#LOW T1MS                                ;initial timer2 reload low byte

MOV RCAP2H,#HIGH T1MS                               ;initial timer2 reload high byte

SETB TR2                                            ;timer2 start running

SETB ET2                                            ;enable timer2 interrupt

SETB EA                                             ;open global interrupt switch

CLR A

MOV COUNT,A

MOV COUNT+1,A                                       ;initial counter

SJMP $

;-----------------------------------------------

232                                               0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

;/* Timer2 interrupt routine */

TM2_ISR:

       PUSH ACC

       PUSH PSW

       CLR TF2

       MOV A,    COUNT

       ORL A,    COUNT+1                                          ;check whether count(2byte) is equal to 0

       JNZ SKIP

       MOV COUNT, #LOW 1000                                       ;1ms * 1000 -> 1s

       MOV COUNT+1,                                   #HIGH 1000

       CPL TEST_LED                                               ;work LED flash

SKIP:

       CLR C

       MOV A,    COUNT                                                ;count--  Limited.

       SUBB A,   #1                                   MCU

       MOV COUNT, A

       MOV A,    COUNT+1

       SUBB A,   #0

       MOV COUNT+1,A

       POP PSW

       POP ACC

            RETI

STC ;-----------------------------------------------
            END

/* --- STC89xx (8-bit/9-bit) ----------------*/

/* --- Mobile: (86)13922805190 -----------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Fax: 86-755-82905966 ---------------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Tel: 86-755-82948412 ----------------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Web: www.STCMCU.com -----------------------------------------------*/

/*  -----------------------*/

/* STC -----------*/

/*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

#include "reg51.h"                  Limited. //System frequency
#include "intrins.h"
                                       //UART baudrate
typedef unsigned char BYTE;
typedef unsigned int WORD;         MCU //None parity
                                       //Odd parity
#define FOSC 18432000L                 //Even parity
                                       //Mark parity
#define BAUD 9600          

/*Define UART parity mode*/

STC #define NONE_PARITY      0 
                             1 
#define ODD_PARITY           2 
#define EVEN_PARITY          3 
#define MARK_PARITY
#define SPACE_PARITY 4             //Space parity

#define PARITYBIT EVEN_PARITY      //Testing even parity

sbit bit9 = P2^2;                  //P2.2 show UART data bit9
bit busy;

void SendData(BYTE dat);
void SendString(char *s);

void main()

{

#if (PARITYBIT == NONE_PARITY)

        SCON = 0x50;               //8-bit variable UART

#elif (PARITYBIT == ODD_PARITY) || (PARITYBIT == EVEN_PARITY) || (PARITYBIT == MARK_PARITY)

        SCON = 0xda;               //9-bit variable UART, parity bit initial to 1

#elif (PARITYBIT == SPACE_PARITY)

        SCON = 0xd2;               //9-bit variable UART, parity bit initial to 0

#endif

                             0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947    249
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.GXWMCU.com Tel:13922829991 Tel:13922805190

   TMOD = 0x20;                                           //Set Timer1 as 8-bit auto reload mode
                                                          //Set auto-reload vaule
   TH1 = TL1 = -(FOSC/12/32/BAUD);                        //Timer1 start run
                                                          //Enable UART interrupt
   TR1 = 1;                                               //Open master interrupt switch

   ES = 1;                      

   EA = 1;                      

            SendString("STC89-90xx\r\nUart Test !\r\n");
            while(1);
}

/*----------------------------

UART interrupt service routine

----------------------------*/

void Uart_Isr() interrupt 4 using 1

{        if (RI)  ited. RI = 0;
}        {        Lim bit9 = RB8; 
                                                          //Clear receive interrupt flag
                                                          //P0 show UART data
                  P0 = SBUF;                              //P2.2 show parity bit
         }
         if (TI)  CU TI = 0;                              //Clear transmit interrupt flag
         {        STC M busy = 0;                         //Clear transmit busy flag
   
   
         }

/*----------------------------

Send a byte data to UART

Input: dat (data to be sent)

Output:None

----------------------------*/

void SendData(BYTE dat)

{

   while (busy);                                          //Wait for the completion of the previous data is sent
                                                          //Calculate the even parity bit P (PSW.0)
   ACC = dat;                                             //Set the parity bit according to P

   if (P)                                                 //Set parity bit to 0
                                                          //Set parity bit to 1
   {

   #if (PARITYBIT == ODD_PARITY)

                  TB8 = 0;           

   #elif (PARITYBIT == EVEN_PARITY)

                  TB8 = 1;           

   #endif

   }

250                                  0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

   else

   {

   #if (PARITYBIT == ODD_PARITY)

               TB8 = 1;           //Set parity bit to 1

   #elif (PARITYBIT == EVEN_PARITY)

               TB8 = 0;           //Set parity bit to 0

   #endif

   }

   busy = 1;

   SBUF = ACC;                    //Send data to UART buffer

}

/*----------------------------

Send a string to UART              Limited. //Check the end of the string
                                  MCU //Send current char and increment string ptr
Input: s (address of string)

Output:None

----------------------------*/

void SendString(char *s)

{

   while (*s)                   

   {

               SendData(*s++);
            }
                STC
}

/*------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
/* --- STC MCU Limited ---------------- ---------------------------------------*/
/* --- STC89xx (8-bit/9-bit) ----------------*/
/* --- Mobile: (86)13922805190 -----------------------------------------------*/
/* --- Fax: 86-755-82905966 ---------------------------------------------------*/
/* --- Tel: 86-755-82948412 ----------------------------------------------------*/
/* --- Web: www.STCMCU.com -----------------------------------------------*/
/*  -----------------------*/
/* STC -----------*/

;/*Define UART parity mode*/                           //None parity
#define NONE_PARITY 0                                  //Odd parity
#define ODD_PARITY 1                        
#define EVEN_PARITY 2                            ited. //Even parity
#define MARK_PARITY 3                       
#define SPACE_PARITY 4                                 //Mark parity

#define PARITYBIT EVEN_PARITY                    Lim //Space parity

;-----------------------------------------             //Testing even parity

            BUSY BIT 20H.0                      MCU ;transmit busy flag

STC ;-----------------------------------------
            ORG 0000H

            LJMP MAIN
        ORG 0023H

        LJMP UART_ISR

;-----------------------------------------

        ORG 0100H

MAIN:

        CLR BUSY

        CLR EA

        MOV SP,                   #3FH

#if (PARITYBIT == NONE_PARITY)

        MOV SCON, #50H                          ;8-bit variable UART

#elif (PARITYBIT == ODD_PARITY) || (PARITYBIT == EVEN_PARITY) || (PARITYBIT == MARK_PARITY)

        MOV SCON, #0DAH                         ;9-bit variable UART, parity bit initial to 1

#elif (PARITYBIT == SPACE_PARITY)

        MOV SCON, #0D2H                         ;9-bit variable UART, parity bit initial to 0

#endif

;-------------------------------

252                                             0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

MOV TMOD, #20H                                ;Set Timer1 as 8-bit auto reload mode

MOV A,                            #0FBH       ;256-18432000/12/32/9600

MOV TH1, A                                    ;Set auto-reload vaule

MOV TL1, A

SETB TR1                                      ;Timer1 start run

SETB ES                                       ;Enable UART interrupt

SETB EA                                       ;Open master interrupt switch

;-------------------------------

MOV DPTR, #TESTSTR                            ;Load string address to DPTR

LCALL SENDSTRING                              ;Send string

;-------------------------------

SJMP $

;-----------------------------------------

TESTSTR:                                      ;Test string
ited. ;/*----------------------------
DB "STC89-90xx Uart Test !",0DH,0AH,0         ;Check RI bit
                                              ;Clear RI bit
Lim ;----------------------------*/           ;P0 show UART data
;UART2 interrupt service routine

UART_ISR:CU PUSH PSW

PUSH ACC
M JNB RI,
                                  CHECKTI   
STC MOV P0,
CLR RI                                      

                                  SBUF      

MOV C,                            RB8

MOV P2.2, C                                   ;P2.2 show parity bit

CHECKTI:

JNB TI,                           ISR_EXIT    ;Check S2TI bit

CLR TI                                        ;Clear S2TI bit

CLR BUSY                                      ;Clear transmit busy flag

ISR_EXIT:

POP PSW

POP ACC

RETI

;/*----------------------------
;Send a byte data to UART
;Input: ACC (data to be sent)
;Output:None
;----------------------------*/

                                  0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947  253
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.GXWMCU.com Tel:13922829991 Tel:13922805190

SENDDATA:

        JB   BUSY, $                          ;Wait for the completion of the previous data is sent

        MOV ACC, A                            ;Calculate the even parity bit P (PSW.0)

        JNB P,                   EVEN1INACC   ;Set the parity bit according to P

ODD1INACC:

#if (PARITYBIT == ODD_PARITY)

        CLR TB8                               ;Set parity bit to 0

#elif (PARITYBIT == EVEN_PARITY)

        SETB TB8                              ;Set parity bit to 1

#endif

        SJMP PARITYBITOK

EVEN1INACC:

#if (PARITYBIT == ODD_PARITY)

        ited. CLR TB8SETB TB8               
                                              ;Set parity bit to 1
#elif (PARITYBIT == EVEN_PARITY)              ;Set parity bit to 0
                                              ;Parity bit set completed
                                              ;Send data to UART buffer
Lim PARITYBITOK:
#endif

                                 

        SETB BUSY
        CU RET
        MOV SBUF, A                         

M ;/*----------------------------

;Send a string to UART

STC ;Input: DPTR (address of string)

;Output:None
;----------------------------*/

SENDSTRING:

        CLR A

        MOVC A,                  @A+DPTR      ;Get current char

        JZ   STRINGEND                        ;Check the end of the string

        INC DPTR                              ;increment string ptr

        LCALL SENDDATA                        ;Send current char

        SJMP SENDSTRING                       ;Check next

STRINGEND:

        RET

;-----------------------------------------

        END

9.4 EEPROM(C)

1. C

;STC89C51RC/RD+EEPROM/IAP 

/*------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

/* --- STC MCU Limited ---------------- ---------------------------------------*/

/* --- STC89xx EEPROM/IAP--------------------*/

/* --- Mobile: (86)13922805190 -----------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Fax: 86-755-82905966 ---------------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Tel: 86-755-82948412 ----------------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Web: www.STCMCU.com -----------------------------------------------*/

/*  -----------------------*/

/* STC -----------*/

/*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
                                                         Limited.
#include "reg51.h"
#include "intrins.h"

typedef unsigned char BYTE;
typedef unsigned int WORD;

/*Declare SFR associated with the IAP */
CU sfr IAP_ADDRH = 0xE3;
sfr IAP_DATA = 0xE2;         //Flash data register

M sfr IAP_CMD = 0xE5;
                             //Flash address HIGH

sfr IAP_ADDRL = 0xE4;        //Flash address LOW

STC sfr IAP_CONTR = 0xE7;    //Flash command register

sfr IAP_TRIG = 0xE6;         //Flash command trigger

                             //Flash control register

/*Define ISP/IAP/EEPROM command*/

#define CMD_IDLE 0           //Stand-By

#define CMD_READ 1           //Byte-Read

#define CMD_PROGRAM 2        //Byte-Program

#define CMD_ERASE 3          //Sector-Erase

/*Define ISP/IAP/EEPROM operation const for IAP_CONTR*/

//#define ENABLE_IAP 0x80    //if SYSCLK<40MHz

#define ENABLE_IAP 0x81      //if SYSCLK<20MHz

//#define ENABLE_IAP x82     //if SYSCLK<10MHz

//#define ENABLE_IAP 0x83    //if SYSCLK<5MHz

//Start address for STC89C58xx EEPROM
#define IAP_ADDRESS 0x08000

void Delay(BYTE n);
void IapIdle();
BYTE IapReadByte(WORD addr);
void IapProgramByte(WORD addr, BYTE dat);
void IapEraseSector(WORD addr);

282                                       0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966                     0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

void main()
{

  WORD i;

   P1 = 0xfe;                     //1111,1110 System Reset OK

   Delay(10);                     //Delay

   IapEraseSector(IAP_ADDRESS); //Erase current sector

   for (i=0; i<512; i++)          //Check whether all sector data is FF

   {

      if (IapReadByte(IAP_ADDRESS+i) != 0xff)

        goto Error;               //If error, break

   }

   P1 = 0xfc;                     //1111,1100 Erase successful

   Delay(10);                     //Delay
      ited. IapProgramByte(IAP_ADDRESS+i, (BYTE)i);
   for (i=0; i<512; i++)          //Program 512 bytes data into data flash

   {

   }Lim P1 = 0xf8;

                                  //1111,1000 Program successful

   Delay(10);CU {                 //Delay

   for (i=0; i<512; i++)          //Verify 512 bytes data
        M goto Error;
      if (IapReadByte(IAP_ADDRESS+i) != (BYTE)i)
   STC P1 = 0xf0;
                                  //If error, break

   }

                                  //1111,0000 Verify successful

   while (1);

Error:

   P1 &= 0x7f;                    //0xxx,xxxx IAP operation fail

   while (1);

}

/*----------------------------
Software delay function
----------------------------*/
void Delay(BYTE n)
{

  WORD x;

   while (n--)                    0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966    0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947  283
   {

      x = 0;
      while (++x);
   }
}


STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.GXWMCU.com Tel:13922829991 Tel:13922805190

/*----------------------------   //Close IAP function
Disable ISP/IAP/EEPROM function  //Clear command to standby
Make MCU in a safe state         //Clear trigger register
----------------------------*/   //Data ptr point to non-EEPROM area
void IapIdle()                   //Clear IAP address to prevent misuse
{

   IAP_CONTR = 0;
   IAP_CMD = 0;
   IAP_TRIG = 0;
   IAP_ADDRH = 0x80;
   IAP_ADDRL = 0;
}

/*----------------------------
Read one byte from ISP/IAP/EEPROM area

ited. Input: addr (ISP/IAP/EEPROM address)

Output:Flash data

Lim ----------------------------*/

BYTE IapReadByte(WORD addr)
{

CU BYTE dat;
M IAP_CONTR = ENABLE_IAP;                //Data buffer
STC IAP_ADDRL = addr;
IAP_CMD = CMD_READ;                      //Open IAP function, and set wait time
                                         //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM READ command
                                         //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address low
                                         //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address high
IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8; 

IAP_TRIG = 0x46;                         //Send trigger command1 (0x46)

IAP_TRIG = 0xb9;                         //Send trigger command2 (0xb9)

_nop_();                         //MCU will hold here until ISP/IAP/EEPROM operation complete

dat = IAP_DATA;                          //Read ISP/IAP/EEPROM data

IapIdle();                               //Close ISP/IAP/EEPROM function

   return dat;                           //Return Flash data
}

/*----------------------------
Program one byte to ISP/IAP/EEPROM area
Input: addr (ISP/IAP/EEPROM address)

     dat (ISP/IAP/EEPROM data)
Output:-
----------------------------*/

284                                0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966         0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

void IapProgramByte(WORD addr, BYTE dat)

{

   IAP_CONTR = ENABLE_IAP;                //Open IAP function, and set wait time

   IAP_CMD = CMD_PROGRAM;                 //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM PROGRAM command

   IAP_ADDRL = addr;                      //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address low

   IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;                 //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address high

   IAP_DATA = dat;                        //Write ISP/IAP/EEPROM data

   IAP_TRIG = 0x46;                       //Send trigger command1 (0x46)

   IAP_TRIG = 0xb9;                       //Send trigger command2 (0xb9)

   _nop_();                       //MCU will hold here until ISP/IAP/EEPROM operation complete

   IapIdle();

}

/*----------------------------

Erase one sector area
ited. Output:-
Input: addr (ISP/IAP/EEPROM address)

Lim {
----------------------------*/

void IapEraseSector(WORD addr)

   IAP_CONTR = ENABLE_IAP;                //Open IAP function, and set wait time
   CU IAP_ADDRL = addr;
   IAP_CMD = CMD_ERASE;                   //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM ERASE command

   M IAP_TRIG = 0x46;                     //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address low

   IAP_ADDRH = addr >> 8;                 //Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address high

   STC _nop_();                           //Send trigger command1 (0x46)

   IAP_TRIG = 0xb9;                       //Send trigger command2 (0xb9)

                                  //MCU will hold here until ISP/IAP/EEPROM operation complete

   IapIdle();

}

;STC89C51RC/RD+EEPROM/IAP 
/*------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
/* --- STC MCU Limited ---------------- ---------------------------------------*/
/* --- STC89xx EEPROM/IAP--------------------------*/

;/*Declare SFR associated with the IAP */

IAP_DATA EQU 0E2H                           ;Flash data register     Limited.

IAP_ADDRH EQU 0E3H                          ;Flash address HIGH

IAP_ADDRL EQU 0E4H                          ;Flash address LOW

IAP_CMD EQU 0E5H                            ;Flash command register

IAP_TRIG EQU 0E6H                           ;Flash command trigger

IAP_CONTR EQU 0E7H                          ;Flash control register
CU CMD_IDLE EQU 0
;/*Define ISP/IAP/EEPROM command*/
M CMD_READ EQU 1
                       ;Stand-By

STC CMD_ERASE EQU 3                         ;Byte-Read

CMD_PROGRAM EQU 2                           ;Byte-Program

                                            ;Sector-Erase

;/*Define ISP/IAP/EEPROM operation const for IAP_CONTR*/

;ENABLE_IAP EQU 80H                         ;if SYSCLK<40MHz

ENABLE_IAP EQU 81H                          ;if SYSCLK<20MHz

;ENABLE_IAP EQU 82H                         ;if SYSCLK<10MHz

;ENABLE_IAP EQU 83H                         ;if SYSCLK<5MHz

;//Start address for STC89C58xx EEPROM

IAP_ADDRESS EQU 08000H
;-----------------------------------------

   ORG 0000H
   LJMP MAIN
;-----------------------------------------

            ORG 0100H  ;1111,1110 System Reset OK
MAIN:                  ;Delay

   MOV P1,#0FEH
   LCALL DELAY

286                                         0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

;-------------------------------

MOV DPTR, #IAP_ADDRESS                            ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address

         LCALL IAP_ERASE                          ;Erase current sector

;-------------------------------

MOV DPTR, #IAP_ADDRESS                            ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address

MOV R0, #0                                        ;Set counter (512)

MOV R1, #2

CHECK1:                                           ;Check whether all sector data is FF

LCALL IAP_READ                                    ;Read Flash

CJNE A,                           #0FFH, ERROR    ;If error, break

INC DPTR                                          ;Inc Flash address

DJNZ R0, CHECK1                                   ;Check next

DJNZ R1, CHECK1                                   ;Check next

;-------------------------------
ited. ;-------------------------------
MOV P1,                           #0FCH           ;1111,1100 Erase successful
                                                  ;Delay
LCALL DELAY                              
                                                  ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address
Lim MOV R0, #0                                    ;Set counter (512)
MOV DPTR, #IAP_ADDRESS
                                                  ;Initial test data
                                                  ;Program 512 bytes data into data flash
                                                  ;Ready IAP data
CU NEXT:                                          ;Program flash
MOV R1, #2                                        ;Inc Flash address
                                                  ;Modify test data
MOV R2, #0                               
M LCALL IAP_PROGRAM
                                  

MOV A,                            R2     
STC INC DPTR
                                         

                                         

INC R2                                   

DJNZ R0, NEXT                                     ;Program next

DJNZ R1, NEXT                                     ;Program next

;-------------------------------

MOV P1,                           #0F8H           ;1111,1000 Program successful

LCALL DELAY                                       ;Delay

;-------------------------------

MOV DPTR, #IAP_ADDRESS                            ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address

MOV R0, #0                                        ;Set counter (512)

MOV R1, #2

MOV R2, #0

CHECK2:                                           ;Verify 512 bytes data

LCALL IAP_READ                                    ;Read Flash

CJNE A,2,ERROR                                    ;If error, break

INC DPTR                                          ;Inc Flash address

INC R2                                            ;Modify verify data

DJNZ R0, CHECK2                                   ;Check next

DJNZ R1, CHECK2                                   ;Check next

                                  0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947  287
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.GXWMCU.com Tel:13922829991 Tel:13922805190

;-------------------------------  #0F0H         ;1111,0000 Verify successful
            MOV P1,                             ;0xxx,xxxx IAP operation fail
            SJMP $                R0
                                  R1
;-------------------------------  R2
ERROR:
                                            
            MOV P0,
            MOV P2,
            MOV P3,
            CLR P1.7
            SJMP $

;/*----------------------------

;Software delay function

;----------------------------*/

DELAY:

            CLR A                 A           MCU  Limited.
            MOV R0,               A
            MOV R1,               #20H
            MOV R2,
DELAY1:                           DELAY1
            DJNZ R0,              DELAY1
            DJNZ R1,              DELAY1
            DJNZ R2,
            RET

STC ;/*----------------------------

;Disable ISP/IAP/EEPROM function
;Make MCU in a safe state
;----------------------------*/
IAP_IDLE:

        MOV IAP_CONTR,                    #0    ;Close IAP function

        MOV IAP_CMD, #0                         ;Clear command to standby

        MOV IAP_TRIG, #0                        ;Clear trigger register

        MOV IAP_ADDRH,                    #80H  ;Data ptr point to non-EEPROM area

        MOV IAP_ADDRL,                    #0    ;Clear IAP address to prevent misuse

        RET

;/*----------------------------
;Read one byte from ISP/IAP/EEPROM area
;Input: DPTR(ISP/IAP/EEPROM address)
;Output:ACC (Flash data)
;----------------------------*/

288                                           0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966     0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

IAP_READ:

           MOV IAP_CONTR,        #ENABLE_IAP                   ;Open IAP function, and set wait time

           MOV IAP_CMD,          #CMD_READ                     ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM READ command

           MOV IAP_ADDRL,        DPL                           ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address low

           MOV IAP_ADDRH,        DPH                           ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address high

           MOV IAP_TRIG,         #46H                          ;Send trigger command1 (0x46)

           MOV IAP_TRIG,         #0B9H                         ;Send trigger command2 (0xb9)

           NOP                   ;MCU will hold here until ISP/IAP/EEPROM operation complete

           MOV A,                IAP_DATA                      ;Read ISP/IAP/EEPROM data

           LCALL IAP_IDLE                                      ;Close ISP/IAP/EEPROM function

           RET

;/*----------------------------

;Program one byte to ISP/IAP/EEPROM area

;Input: DPAT(ISP/IAP/EEPROM address)
ited. ;----------------------------*/
; ACC (ISP/IAP/EEPROM data)

;Output:-

IAP_PROGRAM:Lim MOV IAP_CONTR,

                                 #ENABLE_IAP ;Open IAP function, and set wait time

           MOV IAP_CMD, #CMD_PROGRAM         ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM PROGRAM command
           CU MOV IAP_DATA,
           MOV IAP_ADDRL,        DPL         ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address low

           MOV IAP_ADDRH,        DPH         ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address high
           M MOV IAP_TRIG, #46H
                                 A           ;Write ISP/IAP/EEPROM data

           STC NOP                           ;Send trigger command1 (0x46)

           MOV IAP_TRIG, #0B9H               ;Send trigger command2 (0xb9)

                                 ;MCU will hold here until ISP/IAP/EEPROM operation complete

           LCALL IAP_IDLE        ;Close ISP/IAP/EEPROM function

           RET

;/*----------------------------

;Erase one sector area

;Input: DPTR(ISP/IAP/EEPROM address)

;Output:-

;----------------------------*/

IAP_ERASE:

           MOV IAP_CONTR,        #ENABLE_IAP ;Open IAP function, and set wait time

           MOV IAP_CMD, #CMD_ERASE           ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM ERASE command

           MOV IAP_ADDRL,        DPL         Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address low

           MOV IAP_ADDRH,        DPH         ;Set ISP/IAP/EEPROM address high

           MOV IAP_TRIG, #46H                ;Send trigger command1 (0x46)

           MOV IAP_TRIG, #0B9H               ;Send trigger command2 (0xb9)

           NOP                   ;MCU will hold here until ISP/IAP/EEPROM operation complete

           LCALL IAP_IDLE                    ;Close ISP/IAP/EEPROM function

           RET

           END

                                 0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947           289
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.GXWMCU.com Tel:13922829991 Tel:13922805190

/* --- STC MCU Limited. --------------- ----------------------------------------*/

CU /* --- STC 1T  --------------*/

/* --- Mobile: (86)13922805190 ------------------------------------------------*/

M /* --- Fax: 86-755-82905966 ----------------------------------------------------*/

/* --- Tel: 86-755-82948412 -----------------------------------------------------*/

/* STC -------------------*/

/*-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/

#include <reg51.h>
#include <instrins.h>

sfr IAP_CONTR = 0xc7;
sbit MCU_Start_Led = P1^7;

#define Self_Define_ISP_Download_Command 0x22

#define RELOAD_COUNT 0xfb           //18.432MHz,12T,SMOD=0,9600bps

//#define RELOAD_COUNT 0xf6 //18.432MHz,12T,SMOD=0,4800bps

//#define RELOAD_COUNT 0xec //18.432MHz,12T,SMOD=0,2400bps

//#define RELOAD_COUNT 0xd8 //18.432MHz,12T,SMOD=0,1200bps

void serial_port_initial(void);
void send_UART(unsigned char);
void UART_Interrupt_Receive(void);

324                                 0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966    0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.STCMCU.com QQ:800003751 STC -- 8051

void soft_reset_to_ISP_Monitor(void);
void delay(void);
void display_MCU_Start_Led(void);

void main(void)
{

            unsigned char i = 0;

    serial_port_initial();            //Initial UART

    display_MCU_Start_Led();          //Turn on the work LED

    send_UART(0x34);                  //Send UART test data

    send_UART(0xa7);                  //Send UART test data

    while (1);

 }

 ited. {
 void serial_port_initial()

    Lim TH1 = RELOAD_COUNT; 
    SCON = 0x50;                                        //0101,0000 8
                                                        //0011,0001 18
    TMOD = 0x21;                                        //1

    CU ES                                               //1
    TL1 = RELOAD_COUNT;                                 //
                                                        //
    TR1 = 1; 
 M }
                = 1; 

    EA          = 1; 
 STC void send_UART(unsigned char i)
{

    ES = 0;                           //Disable serial interrupt

    TI = 0;                           //Clear TI flag

    SBUF = i;                         //send this data

    while (!TI);                      //wait for the data is sent

    TI = 0;                           //clear TI flag

    ES = 1;                           //enable serial interrupt

}

 void UART_Interrupt_Receive(void) interrupt 4 using 1

{

    unsigned char k = 0;

    if (RI)

    {

                RI = 0;

                k = SBUF;

                if (k == Self_Define_ISP_Command)               //check the serial data
                                                                //delay 1s
                {

                                  delay();

                                  0513-5501 2928 / 2929 / 2966  0513-5501 2969 / 2956 / 2947  325
STC89C51RC/RD+ :www.GXWMCU.com Tel:13922829991 Tel:13922805190

                            delay();                      //delay 1s
                            soft_reset_to_ISP_Monitor();


                  }

   }

   if (TI)

   {

                  TI = 0;

   }

}

void soft_reset_to_ISP_Monitor(void)

{

   IAP_CONTR = 0x60;                       //0110,0000 soft reset system to run ISP monitor

}                                                         Limited.

void delay(void)

{

   unsigned int j = 0;

   unsigned int g = 0;

   CU {
   for (j=0; j<5; j++)

M 
                  for (g=0; g<60000; g++)
STC 
                  {

                            _nop_();

                            _nop_();

                            _nop_();

                            _nop_();

                            _nop_();

                  }

   }

}

void display_MCU_Start_Led(void)

{

   unsigned char i = 0;

   for (i=0; i<3; i++)

   {

                  MCU_Start_Led = 0;       //Turn on work LED
                                           //Turn off work LED
                  dejay();                 //Turn on work LED

                  MCU_Start_Led = 1;

                  dejay();

                  MCU_Start_Led = 0;

   }

}
